page: Microsoft Azure HB120-32rs_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the HBrsv2 family. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs allocated via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 456.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 14.25 GB per vCPU.

This instance includes 1452 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It is also RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access) capable, which supports low-latency, high-throughput networking interfaces. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this server type.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory density relative to the vCPU count positions this server as a specialized resource for memory-bound workloads rather than general-compute tasks. The lack of integrated GPU hardware limits its utility for accelerated machine learning or graphics rendering. Given the high memory capacity, local storage, and RDMA capabilities, this server is configured for memory-intensive databases, large-scale simulations, and high-performance computing (HPC) workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure HB120-32rs_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server within the HBrsv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It provides 32 dedicated vCPUs and 456.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a high memory allocation of 14.25 GB per core. The instance features 1452 GB of local storage, supports Premium Storage, and is RDMA capable for high-throughput networking. It does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Qualitatively, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this server highly resource-dense for memory-bound tasks, though it represents a tradeoff for workloads requiring high raw compute-to-memory ratios or hardware acceleration. This server is suited for memory-intensive databases, high-performance computing, and large-scale simulation workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized, RDMA-capable virtual server featuring thirty-two dedicated vCPUs, substantial RAM density, and local storage for demanding enterprise workloads.

1452 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
